testsuite.name: com.amazon.agentio.lib.eval.AgenticFunctionTrialsTest

testcase.name: MajorityOccurredAgentOutputSelector should select most frequent output()
AgenticFunctionTrials should run multiple trials and select result()

testsuite.system-out: 20:48:28.569 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-1 @coroutine#169] INFO c.a.a.lib.eval.AgenticFunctionTrials - Invoking agent for trial: 0 20:48:28.574 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-1 @coroutine#176] INFO c.a.a.lib.eval.AgenticFunctionTrials - Invoking agent for trial: 1 20:48:28.574 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-2 @coroutine#175] INFO c.a.a.lib.eval.AgenticFunctionTrials - Invoking agent for trial: 0 20:48:28.574 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-4 @coroutine#177] INFO c.a.a.lib.eval.AgenticFunctionTrials - Invoking agent for trial: 2 20:48:28.578 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-4 @coroutine#184] INFO c.a.a.lib.eval.AgenticFunctionTrials - Invoking agent for trial: 1 20:48:28.578 [DefaultDispatcher-worker-2 @coroutine#183] INFO c.a.a.lib.eval.AgenticFunctionTrials - Invoking agent for trial: 0
